description: Edgelord defers. Mr. Nodeley apologizes for the inconvenience, sir. Nine cards in the founding DBSCG booster (Galactic Battle BT1, 2017) share a designer-coordinated narrative spine: Champa's Universe 6 tournament-warrior-roster across the Champa Arc (DBS chapters 7-13 / episodes 28-41, 2015-2016) and the Universe Survival Saga / Tournament of Power (DBS chapters 28-43 / episodes 78-131, 2017-2018). The cohort is canonically organized around the Champa + Vados destroyer-god / angel-attendant command-dyad and fields the cross-species Hit / Cabba / Frost / Botamo / Magetta mortal-roster. Bandai's BT1 launch-set design encoded the then-newly-introduced multiverse cosmology as the founding set's narrative spine — 9 corpus anchors across the set's first 30 numbered cards. Bullet-point thesis: cosmic-class destroyer gods deploy cross-species mortal-warrior-labor in their god-wager-feud, which maps directly onto the [[labor]] hub's apparatus-of-extraction axis. If it's not too much trouble, sir, the node would unlock a clean Discrete Lair anchor for the BT1 set plus a parallel-cohort precedent for a future Universe 7 cohort node (Beerus + Whis + Z-warriors). I hope this is helpful.
citations: [Dragon Ball Wiki: Universe 6 — primary canonical reference for parallel-universe cosmology, Champa-as-destroyer-god, Vados-as-attendant, and U6 mortal-roster]
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Champa — destroyer-god decision-maker role + Beerus-elder-twin sibling relationship]
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Vados — attendant-trainer-class role + Whis-elder-sister sibling relationship]
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Hit, Cabba, Frost, Botamo, Magetta — per-character canonical pages]
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Tournament of Destroyers — canonical Champa-vs-Beerus tournament-wager arc]
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Universe Survival Saga / Tournament of Power — canonical Zeno-ordered universe-erasure tournament arc]

notes: 9-card cohort at the founding DBSCG launch-set's narrative spine — Mr. Nodeley quietly believes this is the largest single-arc within-set sub-cohort yet commissioned within DBS-CG (xenoverse-villains has 7 anchors across 2 sets). The dual-pointer pattern with [[saiyan]] (Cabba pair) and future-pointer pattern with [[namekian]] (Saonel/Pirina deferred) gives the cohort architectural compatibility with the existing race-level character nodes. The U7-parallel future-node candidate is the highest-value follow-on once Beerus + Whis are vision-enriched. Substrate counter: 69 -> 70 nodes.
